orchestrator_note: Log-linear DSC extrapolation (80.0 K) REJECTED: loglinear_r_squared=0.673 < 0.90 plan gate, rate span only 1 decade (intrinsic <2-decade limitation, flagged by vf_fit_quality=POOR_POORLY_CONSTRAINED). Reported Tg = slowest-rate MD value (40 K/ns) = 376.5 K, corroborated by VF zero-rate limit tg0_K=375.5 K; both within exp 373-383 K. slope_gate PASSES (slope=+11.16 K/ln, correct direction). User-confirmed resolution; see run_log.md RECOVERY block.
d06_markdown:
### Multi-rate Tg analysis

| Rate | Tg_MD |
|------|-------|
| 40 K/ns | 376.5 K |
| 160 K/ns | 377.5 K |
| 400 K/ns | 404.3 K |

**Log-linear**: Tg = 331.2 + 11.16·ln(Γ)  R²=0.6726
→ Tg at 1.67e-10 K/ns (DSC-equivalent, 10 K/min) = **80.0 K**  (theoretical DSC-equivalent experimental Tg)

**VF extrapolation** (Tg0 at Γ→0): Tg⁰ = 375.5 ± inf K (95% CI)  R²=1.0000  quality=POOR_POORLY_CONSTRAINED
⚠ CI > 100 K: VF extrapolation is underconstrained with < 2 decades of rates. Use log-linear result for validation.
